parts.text: Hi, I have a wheat field at latitude 19.5 and longitude 75.3, field size is 2.5ha, planted on 2026-05-10.

To keep your wheat healthy, you only need to irrigate on June 27th with 119,163 liters and June 28th with 8,838 liters. Due to favorable rainfall throughout the week, you can skip watering for the rest of the period. This schedule saves you 922,000 liters of water, reducing your usage by 87.8% compared to standard daily irrigation.

Advisory: This recommendation supplements, does not replace, local agricultural extension advice.

Hi, I have a wheat field at latitude 10.0 and longitude 20.0, field size is 3.0ha, planted on 2026-05-10.

To keep your wheat healthy, please irrigate daily from June 27th to July 2nd with the following amounts: 92,895L, 131,205L, 160,050L, 111,315L, 44,370L, and 76,170L. No irrigation is needed on July 3rd due to rainfall. By following this schedule, you will save 644,100 liters of water, which is a 51.1% reduction compared to a standard daily watering routine.

Advisory: This recommendation supplements, does not replace, local agricultural extension advice.
